author: mark
text:
Consolidate duplicated test fixtures into tests/common

Integration tests re-implemented scaffolding locally instead of importing tests/common: three_way() was copy-pasted across 5 files, the version:1 config JSON literal was hand-written in 9 files via differently-named seed functions, and seed/gate_child/show_json/doctor/set_core_bare/break_remote/write_some_code were each duplicated 2-3 times.

Adds common::multidev and common helpers (doctor, set_core_bare, show_json, seed_config), routes deferred-mode forge tests through common::forge, and drops three redundant tests (story_67, story_2, and the merged auth-expired pair). Net -265 lines with no coverage loss; make check is green.
